basics.name: Jacques Thomazo
basics.label: Lead Battery Systems Engineer - Backend Services Developer - 15+ years engineering Battery Systems through simulation and data
basics.summary: Relying on a multidisciplinary profile with a broad range of knowledge and a detail oriented mindset, I have a particular taste for tackling challenging technical problems. Basing myself on a strong analytics skillset in various maths, physics and chemistry fields, I thrive on pushing the boundaries of my work. From batteries to monitoring platform, I span the full development lifecycle of batteries.

work.name: Forsee Power
highlights: Define and build the technical stack behind the company internal telemetry solution and platform.

work.name: Forsee Power
highlights: Developed updated SOH estimation and prediction algorithm specifications for embedded SW application.
Built a hybrid Fuel-Cell Battery System model to explore optimised Energy Management Strategies (Matlab/Simulink/Simscape, Git).
Led development of the Next Generation high cell integration density Battery Platform.
Delivered in-house manufactured prototype packs for a key railway project.

work.name: McLaren Applied
work.summary: Technical lead on a top tier, high performance racing EV battery concept.
highlights: Simulated and optimized battery system sizing for tender specifications requirements
Coordinated multidisciplinary technical optimization workflow

work.name: ARRIVAL
work.summary: Lead functional safety analysis and implementation across HV battery, steer-by-wire and brake-by-wire products.

work.name: ARRIVAL
highlights: Owned the development lifecycle for HV & LV batteries, PCBs and electrical systems: requirements, concepts, design reviews, testing and validation, and manufacturing process.
Spanned electrical system design rules, electronics architecture and integration, thermal and cooling technologies, and functional safety.

work.name: Vantage Power
work.summary: Cell-level long term test bench implementation, from specifications through to continuous data monitoring pipelines.

work.name: Vantage Power
work.summary: Multidisciplinary battery engineer, tackling from HV components sizing and selection to small batch battery production through 3D prototyping and Cooling System simulation

work.name: Renault
work.summary: Built, led and owned battery safety validation for hybrid and electric vehicles battery systems

work.name: EDF R&D — IRDEP
work.summary: Synthesis and characterisation of the zinc-oxide front layer of CIGS thin-film photovoltaic cells.
highlights: Electrochemical synthesis in aqueous solution.
Characterisation of the resulting layers (Hall effect, electrochemical impedance, four-point resistivity, Schottky-diode impedance).
Characterisation of the completed cells.

work.name: LANXESS — Ion Exchange Resins
work.summary: Design, sizing and development of a laboratory production rig for monodisperse beads.
highlights: Studied microfluidic production approaches.
Sized the system and ran lab tests with microfluidic chips.
Implemented the continuous-flow process steps downstream of the chip.

work.name: Chimie ParisTech — LCMCP
work.summary: Research on non-linear optical materials (YAB) at the Laboratoire de Chimie de la Matière Condensée de Paris.
highlights: Solid-state materials synthesis.
Materials characterisation (microscopy, XRD, DSC, TGA).
Laser testing.

work.name: Hitex
work.summary: Optimisation of an industrial-scale extraction process.
highlights: Worked autonomously on a batch process across double-shift operation (extraction, decantation, filtration, evaporative concentration, drying).
Proposed process improvements.

education.institution: École Nationale Supérieure de Chimie de Paris (Chimie ParisTech)
education.area: Renewable Energies, Chemistry, Electrochemistry, Physical Chemistry, Semiconductors

publications.name: A Partnership between Renault and French First Responders to Ensure Safe Intervention on Crash or Fire-Damaged Electrical Vehicles
